description.ko: 영겁의 시간 동안 지질학적 힘에 의해 새겨진 고대 사본처럼 보이는 협곡 바닥의 지형적 세부 사항입니다.
description.en: Topographic details of a canyon floor that look like an ancient manuscript carved by geological forces over eons.

prompt: Hyper-realistic top-down satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Lithic Scroll.' A macro perspective of a high-altitude plateau where layers of #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre rock have been carved by wind into shapes resembling ancient script. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral deposits fill the vertical cracks, creating a high-contrast grid pattern. Dustings of #F4A460 fine sand highlight the topographic ridges. Extreme tactile detail showing individual granules of stone and weathered mineral veins. Cinematic natural lighting with harsh shadows. 8k resolution, emphasizing the earth as a living record of time.
